raw.message: Happy Merge! Unlock the mystery of Dragonia! 🤩

hook.summary: A sad 3D dragon laments the disappearance of all the eggs in a mysterious forest.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of a 3D animated dragon's face with a sad expression, followed by shots of empty nests.
hook.text_overlay: They are gone every last egg vanished without a trace
hook.voiceover_transcript: They are gone... every last egg... vanished without a trace.

scene_flow: Close-up of a sad 3D dragon speaking about missing eggs.
Visuals of empty nests and a stone dragon statue in a dark forest.
A mysterious glowing blue egg appears amidst dark vines.
A magical golden portal effect transitions to the game logo.
Final call to action screen asking the player to help find the eggs.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers who enjoy fantasy-themed collection and puzzle games.
